title: chore(deps): update dependency webdriverio to v5.7.2
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change | References |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| webdriverio | devDependencies | patch | [`5.7.1` -> `5.7.2`](https://diff.intrinsic.com/webdriverio/5.7.1/5.7.2) | [homepage](https://webdriver.io), [source](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>webdriverio/webdriverio</summary>

### [`v5.7.2`](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​572-2019-03-10)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/compare/v5.7.1...v5.7.2)

##### :bug: Bug Fix

-   `webdriverio`
    -   [#​3701](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/pull/3701) webdriverio: fix isDisplayed ([@​mgrybyk](https://togithub.com/mgrybyk))
    -   [#​3697](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/pull/3697) webdriverio: fix options in multiremote ([@​mgrybyk](https://togithub.com/mgrybyk))
-   `wdio-config`
    -   [#​3705](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/pull/3705) Also clear protocol if not set ([@​christian-bromann](https://togithub.com/christian-bromann))

##### :nail_care: Polish

-   `wdio-spec-reporter`
    -   [#​3702](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/pull/3702) Issue 3416: Allow the spec reporter to expose multiple errors if present ([@​nicholasbailey](https://togithub.com/nicholasbailey))
-   `wdio-applitools-service`
    -   [#​3696](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/pull/3696) [FEATURE] Add ability to set serverUrl ([@​kevinmcdonnell](https://togithub.com/kevinmcdonnell))
-   `wdio-cli`, `wdio-config`, `wdio-reporter`
    -   [#​3625](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/pull/3625) Create a `outputDir` logs folder if doesn't exist ([@​nami-varthakavi](https://togithub.com/nami-varthakavi))
-   `wdio-browserstack-service`
    -   [#​3691](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/pull/3691)  browserstack-service: Closes [#​3648](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/issues/3648) modifying name and reason ([@​OriTheMan](https://togithub.com/OriTheMan))

##### :memo: Documentation

-   [#​3695](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/pull/3695) Corrected config field for filtering cucumber scenarios by tag ([@​tompahoward](https://togithub.com/tompahoward))

##### :house: Internal

-   `webdriverio`
    -   [#​3710](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/pull/3710) webdriverio: fix linter errors (fix failing build) ([@​mgrybyk](https://togithub.com/mgrybyk))
-   `wdio-allure-reporter`, `wdio-applitools-service`, `wdio-browserstack-service`, `wdio-cli`, `wdio-config`, `wdio-devtools-service`, `wdio-firefox-profile-service`, `wdio-jasmine-framework`, `wdio-junit-reporter`, `wdio-local-runner`, `wdio-mocha-framework`, `wdio-reporter`, `wdio-runner`, `wdio-sauce-service`, `wdio-selenium-standalone-service`, `wdio-spec-reporter`, `wdio-webdriver-mock-service`, `webdriver`, `webdriverio`
    -   [#​3706](https://togithub.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/pull/3706) Enforce more eslint rules ([@​christian-bromann](https://togithub.com/christian-bromann))

##### Committers: 7

-   Christian Bromann ([@​christian-bromann](https://togithub.com/christian-bromann))
-   Kevin McDonnell ([@​kevinmcdonnell](https://togithub.com/kevinmcdonnell))
-   Mykola Grybyk ([@​mgrybyk](https://togithub.com/mgrybyk))
-   Nami Varthakavi ([@​nami-varthakavi](https://togithub.com/nami-varthakavi))
-   Nicholas Bailey ([@​nicholasbailey](https://togithub.com/nicholasbailey))
-   Ori Efrati ([@​OriTheMan](https://togithub.com/OriTheMan))
-   Tom Howard ([@​tompahoward](https://togithub.com/tompahoward))

</details>
